summary: Tested two UI/UX improvements: 1) Guided Minutes now separates trustees from other attendees with clear UI sections and proper PDF labeling. 2) Compensation page has a 'Recipient Trustee' selector in the Record Payment modal. All 9 backend tests pass (100%). All frontend flows verified working.

issues: Minor eslint warning: 'React Hook useEffect has a missing dependency: loadData'

seed_data_creation: Created test compensation payments with trustee_name field
context_for_next_testing_agent: Two major UI improvements verified: 1) Guided Minutes wizard at /guided-minutes now has separate 'TRUSTEES PRESENT' and 'OTHER ATTENDEES (OPTIONAL)' sections. Trustees are titled 'Trustee' in PDF while others are listed under 'Also Present'. 2) Compensation page at /compensation has 'Recipient Trustee' dropdown in Record Payment modal showing known trustees from the trust. Payments display trustee name badges in the payment list.

guided_minutes_trustee_separation.details: Step 1 UI clearly separates trustees (with checkboxes for known trustees) from other attendees. 'Add Participant' dropdown allows selecting 'Trustee' or 'Other Attendee' role. Helper text explains distinction.

guided_minutes_also_present_ui.details: Other attendees show in 'ALSO PRESENT' section with count. Each attendee can be removed with X button. Helper text: 'They will be listed as Also Present without the Trustee title.'

guided_minutes_api_other_attendees.details: POST /api/guided-minutes/draft accepts 'other_attendees' array separately from 'participants'. POST /api/guided-minutes/save accepts 'other_attendees_text' field.

guided_minutes_pdf_also_present.details: PDF generation in /api/minutes/{id}/pdf includes 'ALSO PRESENT' section when other_attendees_text is present (line 292-296 in minutes.py).

compensation_trustee_selector.details: Record Payment modal has 'RECIPIENT TRUSTEE *' dropdown showing known trustees (John Smith, Jane Smith) plus 'Other (specify in notes)' option.

compensation_trustee_in_api.details: POST /api/compensation-payments accepts 'trustee_name' field. GET /api/compensation-payments returns trustee_name for each payment.

compensation_trustee_badge_display.details: Payment list shows trustee name badges (e.g., 'John Smith', 'Jane Smith') next to payment amounts.

per_trustee_caps_rename.details: 'Trustee-Specific Plans' section renamed to 'Per-Trustee Compensation Caps (Optional)' with informative helper text.
